title: F-15E Strike Eagles Arrive at Gulf Bases
detail: The first 12 F-15E Strike Eagles from RAF Lakenheath land at Al Udeid Air Base in Qatar and Al Dhafra Air Base in the UAE. The aircraft are immediately integrated into CENTCOM's air operations center. Additional munitions shipments arrive at both bases. Gulf state hosts issue no public statements, reflecting the sensitivity of the deployments.

title: ICC Prosecutor Announces Preliminary Examination
detail: The International Criminal Court's Office of the Prosecutor announces it is opening a preliminary examination into the situation in Iran, citing 'reasonable basis to believe crimes against humanity have been committed.' While Iran is not an ICC member state, the prosecutor notes the Security Council may refer the situation. Iran denounces the ICC as 'a tool of Western imperialism.'
